top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to dip as inflation undershoots forecast despite oil surge
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Fresh inflation data this morning showed a reading of 2.8 per cent leading the consumer price index unchanged from May. This came under the expectations of a poll of City analysts by Bloomberg that forecast inflation would come in at three per cent for May. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Falls as US-Iran Deal Set to Add Wave of Supply
top_signals.summary: Oil headed for the longest losing run in 10 months on expectations that a US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz will unleash a wave of supply. Bloomberg's Stephen Stapczynski reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The U.S. is Using Iranian Oil Smuggling Tactics
top_signals.summary: The United States military has overseen scores of secretive ship-to-ship oil transfers to keep Gulf energy exports flowing, using aerial and water drones as well as helicopters in an operation to guide convoys to awaiting tankers.The operation…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s pet owners splurge on preschools to pamper puppies
top_signals.summary: As declining birth rates alter ⁠lifestyles, pets are increasingly treated as members of the family.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Congress reaches deal on housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030
top_signals.summary: The US could soon temporarily ban a central bank digital currency, as House and Senate leaders came to a deal on a housing bill inclusive of a ban.
